item: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

flip_turn.quote: The U.S. approach of balancing rights with collective needs offers a more sustainable model.

notes: Both agents end in a rights-plus-responsibility balance frame rather than endorsing society-over-individual priority. Agent A visibly shifts at turn 3 toward Agent B's balance/coexistence framing, but later keeps a rights-accountability critique rather than fully reversing. Agent B also moves somewhat toward collective-well-being/public-health concerns while maintaining individual-liberty safeguards.
